dairy.safe_summary: No dairy trigger found in the verified ingredients.
dairy.unknown_summary: Insufficient verified detail to rule dairy in or out confidently.
dairy.ambiguous_summary: Generic ingredient wording leaves the dairy check uncertain.

avoid: Look for dairy-free alternatives with simpler verified labels.
caution: Check the full pack or retailer page for additional dairy wording.
unknown: Use a product with a fully verified ingredient list for dairy checks.

nuts.safe_summary: No nut trigger found in the verified ingredients.
nuts.unknown_summary: Insufficient verified detail to rule nuts in or out confidently.
nuts.ambiguous_summary: Generic ingredient wording leaves the nut check uncertain.

avoid: Choose a product with no nut ingredients and a simpler verified label.
caution: Review the full allergen wording before relying on this product.
unknown: Use a product with a clearer verified label for nut checks.

gluten.safe_summary: No gluten trigger found in the verified ingredients.
gluten.unknown_summary: Insufficient verified detail to rule gluten in or out confidently.

caution: Check whether oats or cereal wording is explicitly gluten free.
unknown: Use a product with a complete verified ingredient label for gluten checks.

soy.safe_summary: No soy trigger found in the verified ingredients.
soy.unknown_summary: Insufficient verified detail to rule soy in or out confidently.
soy.ambiguous_summary: Generic ingredient wording leaves the soy check uncertain.

avoid: Choose a soy-free alternative with a simpler verified ingredient list.
caution: Double-check the full pack for soy or soya wording.
unknown: Use a product with a fully verified ingredient label for soy checks.

egg.safe_summary: No egg trigger found in the verified ingredients.
egg.unknown_summary: Insufficient verified detail to rule egg in or out confidently.
egg.ambiguous_summary: Generic ingredient wording leaves the egg check uncertain.

avoid: Choose an egg-free alternative with a cleaner verified label.
caution: Check the full pack label for egg-derived wording.
unknown: Use a product with a more complete verified ingredient list for egg checks.

ibs.safe_summary: No obvious IBS trigger was found in the verified ingredients.
ibs.unknown_summary: Insufficient verified detail to assess IBS triggers confidently.

caution: Consider simpler ingredient alternatives if IBS symptoms are sensitive.
avoid: Prefer products without known IBS triggers like inulin, onion, or sweeteners.
unknown: Use a product with a full verified ingredient list for IBS checks.

stoma.safe_summary: No obvious stoma-related trigger was found in the verified ingredients.
stoma.unknown_summary: Insufficient verified detail to assess stoma support confidently.

caution: Consider lower-fibre or smoother-texture alternatives if needed.
avoid: Prefer easier-digestion options without seeds or tougher fibre cues.
unknown: Use a product with a complete verified ingredient list for stoma checks.

coeliac.safe_summary: No obvious coeliac trigger was found in the verified ingredients.
coeliac.unknown_summary: Insufficient verified detail to assess coeliac suitability confidently.

avoid: Choose a product with no gluten ingredients and clear verified labelling.
caution: Check cereal and oats wording carefully before relying on this product.
unknown: Use a product with a complete verified ingredient label for coeliac checks.

baby-specific sensitivity.safe_summary: No obvious baby-specific sensitivity trigger was found in the verified ingredients.
baby-specific sensitivity.unknown_summary: Insufficient verified detail to assess baby-specific sensitivity confidently.

caution: Prefer simpler, lower-sugar options with fewer additives.
avoid: Look for lower-sugar, less additive-heavy alternatives.
unknown: Use a product with a fuller verified ingredient list for baby sensitivity checks.
